title: Locker Room, Coatroom, and Dressing Room Attendants
description: Provide personal items to patrons or customers in locker rooms, dressing rooms, or coatrooms.

tasks.text: Provide towels and sheets to clients in public baths, steam rooms, and restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign dressing room facilities, locker space, or clothing containers to patrons of athletic or bathing establishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check supplies to ensure adequate availability, and order new supplies when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor patrons' facility use to ensure that rules and regulations are followed, and safety and order are maintained.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean facilities such as floors or locker rooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer customer inquiries or explain cost, availability, policies, and procedures of facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer guest problems or complaints to supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain a lost-and-found collection.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and polish footwear, using brushes, sponges, cleaning fluid, polishes, waxes, liquid or sole dressing, and daubers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Activate emergency action plans and administer first aid, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Procure beverages, food, and other items as requested.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect soiled linen or clothing for laundering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Store personal possessions for patrons, issue claim checks for articles stored, and return articles on receipt of checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate washing machines and dryers to clean soiled apparel and towels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain inventories of clothing or uniforms, accessories, equipment, or linens.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend to needs of athletic teams in clubhouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to patrons by performing duties such as opening doors or carrying bags.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate controls that regulate temperatures or room environments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue gym clothes, uniforms, towels, athletic equipment, and special athletic apparel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide or arrange for services such as clothes pressing, cleaning, or repair.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report and document safety hazards, potentially hazardous conditions, and unsafe practices and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stencil identifying information on equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up various apparatus or athletic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
